rawAssistant: Heading into Hollowfen can be treacherous, especially with that east wind blowing soot in your face. If you're planning to take the north road, you'll want to make sure you've got some decent supplies on hand. I'd recommend bringing a few more charms, like a Windproof or a Heatlight – you never know what kind of weather you'll run into up there. And don't forget some extra rations and a bit of twine – you can never have enough for those long stretches between towns.
